title: `await` used in non-async function
explanation: This error occurs when you use the .await syntax inside a function that is not marked as async. The await keyword can only be used inside async functions or async blocks.
error_message: error[E0728]: `await` is only allowed inside `async` functions and blocks

fixes.description: Use an async block inside a sync function

tip: Remember that async functions return a Future that must be awaited or spawned. The entire call chain up to the runtime entry point needs to be async.
